metric_caveats: This A2 run changes only the model track versus the GPT 4.1-mini and Qwen3.6:35b v2b anchors.
These are partial ExECT S5 diagnostics (five core families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across five families is not comparable to frozen S4 eleven-family or S3 nine-family headlines.

Program variant, prompt version, verifier policy, candidate builder, and AM guard are held fixed against GPT paper-frozen v2b run exect_s5_frequency_pre_vocab_am_guard_frequency_verify_v2b_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260524T211229Z.
GPT 5.5 config uses temperature null per OpenAI compatibility policy.
Do not compare this run to GPT 4.1-mini or Qwen metrics without explicit model_track wording.
Report per-family F1 and monitor guard families (diagnosis, seizure type, annotated medication, investigation).
Record token usage, latency, and billing when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
decision_scope arm; this is a closed-model anchor, not mechanism closure.
